description_long: This bungalow features a single-story rectangular structure with a flat roof and a clean, modern facade. The front is approached by a straight paved walkway flanked by three mature trees and bordered by grass, leading to a small porch area. Large windows are distributed across the front and sides, allowing ample natural light into the interior. The exterior walls are finished in a light, neutral color, and the roofline is simple and unadorned. The property includes a modest front yard with landscaping elements and a clear separation between the walkway and the house. The overall design is functional and contemporary, with an emphasis on open space and accessibility.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, and a landscaped front yard with a paved walkway and trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the walkway, three trees, porch, and main entrance with large windows.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the depth of the house, side windows, and the extension of the walkway and landscaping.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the back facade, rear windows, and the continuation of the yard and trees.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing additional windows, the side yard, and the alignment of the walkway with the house.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped front and side windows
